overall.description: A cinematic game sequence depicting an astronaut performing an EVA spacewalk around a massive industrial orbital station. The character maneuvers in zero gravity against the backdrop of a gas giant planet, with dramatic lighting from a distant sun creating lens flares and high-contrast metallic surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: zero-gravity space environment near orbital station

agents.ego_description: astronaut character floating in zero gravity near a large space station, tethered by a cable with a gas giant visible below

entered.detail: massive industrial truss framework with spherical modules and antenna arrays
large tan-colored gas giant with visible atmospheric bands
small spherical moon or satellite to the left of the station
small spherical moon near the gas giant

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an astronaut floating near a massive industrial space station. The station's complex metal truss structure dominates the upper frame while a large gas giant planet hangs in the lower right. The character drifts slowly forward, tethered by a thin cable, with small moons visible in the distance against the dark starry background.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space with direct sunlight exposure

events.description: camera angle shifts to behind character, facing bright sun creating dramatic lens flare and backlighting

agents.ego_description: character silhouetted against intense sunlight, slowly rotating while drifting

entered.detail: intense bright light source creating lens flare and illuminating the scene from behind

segments.scene_description: The camera angle shifts dramatically to a position behind the astronaut, facing directly toward a bright sun that creates a strong lens flare. The character is silhouetted against the intense light, and the space station moves to the right side of the frame. The gas giant and moons are no longer visible as the view focuses on the backlighting effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital approach to space station truss structure

agents.ego_description: character maneuvering around the station structure using tether propulsion, examining different modules and truss sections

entered.detail: large circular communication dish attached to the station structure

segments.scene_description: Returning to the original camera angle, the character continues drifting around the station's perimeter. The gas giant reappears in the lower right while the station structure rotates through the frame from left to right. A large communication dish becomes visible on the station's surface as the character moves along the truss framework.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep space away from station structure

events.description: character propels away from station structure, increasing distance from the main truss

agents.ego_description: character floating away from the station into open space, drifting with the gas giant prominently below

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the station structure, which gradually shrinks and fades into the distance. The gas giant becomes the dominant visual element, positioned centrally below the character. The tether line remains visible as the character drifts in open space with minimal reference points.

events.description: character approaches and begins navigating along the station's lower truss structure

agents.ego_description: character approaching the station's underside structure, preparing to navigate along the metal truss framework

entered.detail: detailed metal truss framework and support beams of the station underside
extended solar panel arrays attached to the station structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the space station from below, with the massive truss structure filling the upper frame. Solar panel arrays become visible on the left side as the character moves closer to the station's underside. The gas giant remains visible below, providing a dramatic backdrop as the character prepares to navigate the station's exterior framework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement around a massive industrial space station that shifts from a wide orbital perspective to an intimate approach of the station's underside. It begins with an astronaut drifting near a complex metal truss structure against the backdrop of a distant gas giant and small moons. As the camera swings behind the character, the view is momentarily consumed by a blinding sun that creates a strong lens flare and silhouettes the astronaut before the perspective returns to the station's perimeter. The scene then expands as the character drifts away into open space, causing the station to shrink and the gas giant to become the dominant central element. Finally, the camera glides back toward the station from below, where the massive truss framework and solar panel arrays fill the frame against the dramatic backdrop of the planet.
